sections.title: Active Bugs
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Bug AND status != Done

powers.label: Fix Plan
powers.prompt: Create a fix plan for {key} "{summary}". Include root cause, solution approach, and testing strategy.

sections.title: Maintenance Tasks
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Task AND sprint in openSprints()

powers.label: Check Deps
powers.prompt: Check dependencies for {key} "{summary}". Identify outdated packages and vulnerabilities.
